([Latin](/wiki/Latin_language "Latin language"): *Dioecesis Celeiensis*; [Slovene](/wiki/Slovene_language "Slovene language"): *Škofija Celje*) is a [Latin Church](/wiki/Latin_Church "Latin Church") [diocese](/wiki/Diocese "Diocese") of the [Catholic Church](/wiki/Catholic_Church "Catholic Church") located in the city of [Celje](/wiki/Celje "Celje") in the [ecclesiastical province](/wiki/Ecclesiastical_province "Ecclesiastical province") of [Maribor](/wiki/Roman_Catholic_Archdiocese_of_Maribor "Roman Catholic Archdiocese of Maribor") in Slovenia.

The **Diocese of Celje** ([Latin](/wiki/Latin_language "Latin language"): *Dioecesis Celeiensis*; [Slovene](/wiki/Slovene_language "Slovene language"): *Škofija Celje*) is a [Latin Church](/wiki/Latin_Church "Latin Church") [diocese](/wiki/Diocese "Diocese") of the [Catholic Church](/wiki/Catholic_Church "Catholic Church") located in the city of [Celje](/wiki/Celje "Celje") in the [ecclesiastical province](/wiki/Ecclesiastical_province "Ecclesiastical province") of [Maribor](/wiki/Roman_Catholic_Archdiocese_of_Maribor "Roman Catholic Archdiocese of Maribor") in Slovenia.

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Diocese_of_Celje&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: History")]

* April 7, 2006: Established as Diocese of Celje from the [Diocese of Maribor](/wiki/Diocese_of_Maribor "Diocese of Maribor")

## Leadership

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Diocese_of_Celje&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Leadership")]

* [Bishops](/wiki/Bishop "Bishop") of Celje (Roman rite)
  + [Anton Stres](/wiki/Anton_Stres "Anton Stres") (7 April 2006 — 31 January 2010)
  + [Stanislav Lipovšek](/wiki/Stanislav_Lipov%C5%A1ek "Stanislav Lipovšek") (24 April 2010 – 18 September 2018)
  + [Maksimilijan Matjaž](/wiki/Maksimilijan_Matja%C5%BE "Maksimilijan Matjaž") (since 5 March 2021)

## Special churches

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Diocese_of_Celje&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Special churches")]

* Minor basilica:
  + Basilica of the Visitation of Mary, [Petrovče](/wiki/Petrov%C4%8De "Petrovče")
  + Basilica of St. Mary of Lourdes, [Brestanica](/wiki/Brestanica "Brestanica")

## See also

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Diocese_of_Celje&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: See also")]

* [Roman Catholicism in Slovenia](/wiki/Roman_Catholicism_in_Slovenia "Roman Catholicism in Slovenia")
